summary: Crystal‑clear Nak300 recording praised as the best sounding source, though no musical details are given.
review: Reviewers rave about the exceptional audio fidelity of this Nak300 capture, calling it superior to other high‑end microphone recordings and a must‑listen. No comments were made about the band's performance or setlist.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it gives a perfect 5‑star rating for audio quality; no information on show quality, so rating reflects excellent recording with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review highlights the Nak300 mics delivering superb clarity and surpassing other expensive microphone setups; no noted flaws.
